title: AI Disruption Returns: Cybersecurity Stocks Tumble On Report Of New Anthropic "Step Change" AI Model
summary:
AI Disruption Returns: Cybersecurity Stocks Tumble On Report Of New Anthropic "Step Change" AI Model

            Cybersecurity stocks are slumping in premarket trading on Friday as the AI disruption trade returns after a Fortune report said Anthropic is testing a new AI model that “poses significant cybersecurity risks.”

According to the report, Anthropic is "developing and has begun testing with early access customers a new AI model more capable than any it has released previously," the compa
summary_ko: 신규 AI 모델의 개발로 인해 사이버 보안 스톡이 하락하고 있으며, 이는 AI 기술의 발전과 함께 사이버 보안 산업에 큰 변화를 가져올 수 있다.

title: STAT+: China’s biotech boom is rewriting everything
summary: In today's Readout newsletter, how China's biotech boom is rewriting everything and how an NIH crackdown is disrupting global science collaboration.
summary_ko: 중국의 바이오테크 산업이 급성장하며 새로운 기술과 투자 기회를 창출하고 있다.

title: Sarepta sees early success with RNAi drugs from Arrowhead
summary: Long-awaited results from Phase 1/2 studies lifted Sarepta’s stock and, according to the company, suggest potential for two medicines to treat muscle-weakening conditions.
summary_ko: Sarepta의 RNAi 약물이 근무약화 질환 치료에 잠재력을 보였습니다.

title: Merck to buy Terns in $6.7B bet on a ‘differentiated’ leukemia drug
summary: If consummated, the deal would hand Merck a treatment that could challenge Novartis’ fast-selling Scemblix. But the low purchase premium — which one analyst described as a "steal" — may leave room for a competing bid.
summary_ko: Merck가 Terns를 6.7억 달러에 인수하여 백혈병 치료제 시장에 진출합니다.

title: Gilead, with Ouro deal, wagers $1.7B on bispecifics for autoimmune diseases
summary: Acquiring Ouro Medicines, which launched last year, hands Gilead an antibody designed to bind to BCMA and CD3, a pair of immune cell proteins that are popular targets for drugmakers.
summary_ko: Gilead가 Ouro Medicines를 인수하여 자가면역 질환 치료를 위한 비스펙시픽스 기술을 확보했습니다.

title: Merck’s deal for Terns sparks debate over a possible biotech bidding war
summary: Some investors and analysts believe the pharma’s $6.7 billion offer is justified given Terns’ recent stock run. Others are convinced a better proposal is coming.
summary_ko: Merck의 Terns 인수 제안이 바이오텍 업계에서 인수 전쟁을 촉발할 수 있다.

title: FDA clears Denali drug in ‘clear step’ for rare disease biotechs
summary: The approval of Denali’s Hunter syndrome treatment, Avlayah, comes after a series of drug rejections and delays that had led to criticism of the FDA’s stance on rare disease therapies.
summary_ko: Denali의 Hunter 증후군 치료제 Avlayah가 FDA 승인을 받았다. 이는 희귀병 치료제 개발에 긍정적인 신호이다.

title: Beam posts positive data on base editing treatment for AATD
summary: Updated data showed the biotech's approach to the rare lung and liver condition helped restore functional protective proteins in a small study.
summary_ko: Beam의 베이스 에디팅 치료법이 희귀한 폐와 간 질환인 AATD에서 긍정적인 결과를 보였습니다.

title: After local tumor approval, Novocure touts positive data in metastatic pancreatic cancer
summary: After collecting an FDA approval earlier this year for local pancreatic cancer, Novocure is putting forward positive clinical data for its electric field-based treatment in metastatic cases of the aggressive disease.
summary_ko: Novocure의 전기장 기반 치료법이 전이성 췌장암에서 긍정적인 결과를 보였습니다.
